/* Simple client-side script to confirm static asset serving */
console.log('App JS loaded');

# Express + Tailwind (CDN) Starter

This project initializes an Express server with TypeScript, serving a static `index.html` (styled with Tailwind via CDN) and other assets from the `public/` folder.

## Prerequisites
- Node.js 18+ recommended

## Install
- npm install

## Run
- npm start
- Open http://localhost:3000

## Development
- Edit files in `src/` for server code and `public/` for static assets.
- The server listens on port 3000 by default. Override with `PORT` environment variable when starting (e.g., `PORT=4000 npm start`).

## Test
- npm test

## Project Structure
- src/app.ts: Express app setup (static serving and routes)
- src/server.ts: Server bootstrap
- public/: Static assets (index.html, app.js)
- tests/: Automated tests using Mocha, Chai, and Supertest

notes: Run npm start to build and serve the app at http://localhost:3000.
Tests compile the TypeScript sources before running Mocha.
